---
applyTo: "frontend/**,src/**/*.tsx,src/**/*.jsx,src/**/*.css,src/**/*.scss,app/**/*.tsx,app/**/*.jsx,components/**,pages/**"
---

Frontend rules:
- Preserve the existing design language and UI consistency.
- Verify empty, loading, success, and error states.
- Verify form validation and feedback messages.
- Verify accessibility basics.
- Verify responsive behavior.
- Check browser console errors.
- Validate the affected flow in the browser.
- Use Playwright for impacted UI flows where applicable.
- Do not mark complete until UI/UX is confirmed.
